title: The First 100 Days of Trump: What Just Happened and What Comes Next? Trade, Tariffs and Political Destabilization
content:
## The First 100 Days of Trump: What Just Happened and What Comes Next? Trade, Tariffs and Political Destabilization
Billions of dollars in goods and services cross the Canada-U.S. border daily, accounting for a significant amount of trade. The impact of tariffs on the retail, consumer markets and manufacturing sectors and an escalating trade war has shaken business and consumer confidence, and trying to keep up with on-again/off-again decisions on where these will be applied and how is a challenge.
Please join Martha Harrison and Awanish Sinha as they address tariffs, the political environment and issues directly affecting the industry and your business.
Note: All instructions and information on how to access the webinar will be forwarded a few days before the event.
This program qualifies for up to 1 hour of CPD credit under the mandatory education regimes in British Columbia and Ontario.
Barreau du Québec Continuing Education: This program contains up to 1 hour of content. For more information regarding the declaration and recognition of educational activities, please contact the Barreau du Québec .
For questions about this event, please contact clientevents@mccarthy.ca .
